title: Recipe for an ingenue:
content:
A pound and three-quarters of kitten,
        Three ounces of flounces and sighs;
     Add wiggles and giggles and gurgles,
        And ringlets and dimples and eyes.

        - Life.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Recipe for an ingenue:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
